description_long: This rifle features a robust, dark metallic body with a fixed wooden stock and a prominent pistol grip, reminiscent of classic submachine gun designs such as the Thompson. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from metal, with a cylindrical barrel extending forward and a rectangular fore-end. The stock and foregrip appear to be made of polished wood, providing both structural support and ergonomic handling. The magazine is not visible, suggesting it may be internal or omitted in this depiction. The rifle includes basic iron sights aligned along the top of the receiver and barrel, and the muzzle is simple, lacking any visible device such as a flash hider or suppressor. The overall finish is sleek and glossy, with a predominantly black and dark brown color scheme.
description: A classic-style rifle with a fixed wooden stock, metal receiver, and barrel, finished in black and dark brown with iron sights and a sleek, glossy appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed wooden stock, pistol grip, and metal barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the width of the fore-end, with the stock and grip mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the wooden stock, grip, and barrel from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the rest of the rifle's body mostly hidden.
